name: 30" x 24" 2pk Marble Framed Printed Canvases Black/Tan - Threshold™: Abstract Digital Art, Modern Wall Decor, Bedroom & Living Room
description:
Bring in some charm to your decor space by putting up this 30" x 24" 2pk Marble Framed Printed Canvases Black/Tan from Threshold™. This striking piece has the perfect size to be displayed on its own or with other artwork as part of a gallery wall. You could even prop this Threshold™ marble framed printed canvas board up against the wall on a cabinet or side table to bring any area to life.

Casual classics for house and home.
